query: For our 'Enterprise Discovery Call' scenario, pull the last 50 sessions and tell me the top 5 improvement areas for the team.
expected_behavior: Calls ttai:list_organizations and uses org context with is_org true on ttai:list_sessions
Resolves the scenario ID via ttai:list_scenarios and paginates ttai:list_sessions until 50 sessions (or all available) are collected
Aggregates report_card topics weighted by weight and clusters weaknesses into behavior-named themes, excluding unanalyzed sessions from score math and reporting their count
Backs each top improvement area with session evidence (quotes or analytics_url links)
Produces the Team performance report structure from references/report-templates.md

query: Pull the 5 lowest-scoring sessions for our onboarding scenario and figure out what went wrong.
expected_behavior: Uses ttai:list_sessions to collect the population, sorts by evaluation_results.final_score ascending, and takes the bottom 5
Fetches details with ttai:get_sessions_batch and reads transcript_url contents for the actual conversations
Distinguishes scenario faults from user-skill faults, and recommends handing off to the scenario-refiner skill if the scenario is at fault
Reports findings with transcript evidence, not just score numbers

query: How did priya@example.com do on her practice sessions this month? Put together a coaching report.
expected_behavior: Filters ttai:list_sessions by user_email and from_date for the current month
Computes per-topic averages and a score trend across her sessions
Uses the Individual coaching report template with at most 3 focus areas and action items drawn from improvement_results
Notes the sample size caveat if fewer than ~10 analyzed sessions exist
